summary: FINAL COMPREHENSIVE TEST - NT Commerce SaaS. All 13 features tested and PASSED. Backend: 26/26 tests. Frontend: All major flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All authentication flows working correctly (Super Admin and Tenant)
Dashboard stats cards showing real data with correct calculations
POS page has session bar with open/close functionality
18 POS shortcuts visible with right-click edit capability (verified in iteration 54)
French language switching works with proper translations
SaaS Admin panel has all tabs: Tenants, Plans, Payments, System Errors
System Errors showing real API data with maintenance actions working
seed_data_creation: Using existing tenant and super admin accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. This is the final release test - iteration 55. The system is production-ready.
